title.en: China-to-Rwanda Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入卢旺达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入盧旺達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Rwanda RSB conformity and import requirements, RURA regulatory licensing, REG/EUCL grid-connection technical conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and off-grid/mini-grid product quality context (IEC/VeraSol) — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与卢旺达RSB合格评定及进口要求、RURA监管许可、REG/EUCL并网技术条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及离网/微网产品质量背景（IEC/VeraSol）——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與盧旺達RSB合格評定及進口要求、RURA監管許可、REG/EUCL併網技術條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及離網／微網產品品質背景（IEC/VeraSol）——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, RSB conformity scope determination, RURA licensing approval, REG/EUCL grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Rwanda RSB import conformity requirements, RURA technical licensing conditions, REG/EUCL grid-connection technical specifications, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、RSB合格评定范围裁定、RURA许可批准、REG/EUCL并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行卢旺达RSB进口合格要求、RURA技术许可条件、REG/EUCL并网技术规格及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、RSB合格評定範圍裁定、RURA許可批准、REG/EUCL併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行盧旺達RSB進口合格要求、RURA技術許可條件、REG/EUCL併網技術規格及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Rwanda, the key practical gaps are: (1) RSB import conformity — Rwanda operates a pre-export/import conformity verification (PVoC-style) regime under RSB; inverters may require a Certificate of Conformity or pre-shipment inspection depending on product category designation; (2) RURA regulatory licensing — grid-tied PV systems and mini-grid operators require RURA licensing; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence is the expected international baseline for utility and project procurement in Rwanda; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for grid-tied systems; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence; and (6) firmware validation against Rwanda's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid parameters. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines are not automatically accepted and cannot be substituted for IEC-referenced evidence without supplementary test documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口卢旺达时，主要实际差距包括：（1）RSB进口合格评定——卢旺达依据RSB实施出口前/进口合格验证（类PVoC）制度，逆变器可能需根据产品类别提交合格证书或装运前检验；（2）RURA监管许可——并网光伏系统和微网运营商须取得RURA许可；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据是卢旺达公用事业和项目采购的预期国际基准；（4）并网系统的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC证据；（6）针对卢旺达50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网参数的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准不自动获得认可，不可在没有补充测试文件的情况下替代IEC参考证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口盧旺達時，主要實際差距包括：（1）RSB進口合格評定——盧旺達依據RSB實施出口前／進口合格驗證（類PVoC）制度，逆變器可能需根據產品類別提交合格證書或裝運前檢驗；（2）RURA監管許可——併網光伏系統和微網運營商須取得RURA許可；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據是盧旺達公用事業和項目採購的預期國際基準；（4）併網系統的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC證據；（6）針對盧旺達50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網參數的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準不自動獲得認可，不可在沒有補充測試文件的情況下替代IEC參考證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
